snippet.title: Jeff Teague recounts shoving LeBron James in NBA playoffs | Club 520 Podcast
snippet.description:
Jeff Teague tells a story of when he shoved LeBron James into the crowd in the NBA playoffs during a series between the Hawks and Cavs. Jeff then talks about Karl-Anthony Towns and Ben Simmons fighting, where Jeff was responsible for getting Joel Embiid off of KAT. The guys then discuss the latest fight in the NBA between Draymond Green and Rudy Gobert.

snippet.title: James Tague - Witness to the assassination of President John F. Kennedy
snippet.description:
James Tague was a witness to the assassination of U.S. President John F. Kennedy in Dallas, Texas on November 22, 1963. He received a minor wound on his right cheek during the assassination.
Like many of the witnesses, Tague remembered hearing his first shot and likened it to a "firecracker." Tague testified that the first shot he remembered hearing occurred after the Presidential limousine had completed the 120-degree slow turn from Houston Street onto Elm Street and straightened out, coming towards Tague.
Right after the shots Tague was approached by a Dallas police detective who immediately noticed that Tague had specks of blood on his right facial cheek.
In 1964, six months after the assassination, and only after the curb being struck with a bullet became widely known, Tague was called to testify to the Warren Commission.
This clip is from Mark Lane's Rush to Judgment (1967)

snippet.title: Jordan Crawford on dunking on LeBron James, getting lost in Joe Johnson’s house | Club 520 Podcast
snippet.description:
We're back with Season 2, Episode 7 of Club 520 where Jeff Teague and the guys are joined by Jordan Crawford to tell stories about his playing days. Crawford talks about getting a scholarship to play at Indiana even though he didn’t play high school basketball, what it was like dunking on LeBron James, getting drafted and playing for the Atlanta Hawks with Jeff Teague, and many more of his best stories about playing in the NBA.

For bonus episodes, BTS, and early access subscribe to Club 520 on Patreon!

snippet.title: Best NBA jerseys, why Jordan Poole is next James Harden + Is LeBron the GOAT? | Club 520 Podcast
snippet.description:
We're back with Season 2, Episode 8 of Club 520 where Jeff Teague and the guys discuss all things basketball like who had the best NBA jersey of all time and the worst trash talk Jeff Teague ever heard from a fan. The guys also talk about how Karl-Anthony Towns was Victor Wembanyama before Victor Wembanyama, whether Jordan Poole can be the next James Harden, and what LeBron James has to do to become the GOAT.

snippet.title: Ish Smith on his record-breaking NBA career, Wake Forest team with Jeff Teague | Club 520 Podcast
snippet.description:
We’re back with Season 2, Episode 14 of Club 520 where Jeff Teague and the guys are joined by Ish Smith of the Charlotte Hornets, and longtime friend and college teammate of Jeff Teague at Wake Forest. Ish and Jeff talk about stories of playing together at Wake Forest from becoming the No. 1 team in the nation, to Jeff getting drafted, to Ish setting an NBA record for playing with the most teams in NBA history at 13. Ish names his Top 5 favorite cities he’s played in, Top 5 players he’s played with, and much more.

For bonus episodes, BTS, and early access subscribe to Club 520 on Patreon!

snippet.title: Charles Oakley's Brutal Truth on Why He'll Never Coach Again! #shortvideo #shorts #short #nba
snippet.description:
Retired NBA star and former coach Charles Oakley speaks his mind on why he'll never return to coaching in this must-see interview. Oakley shares some hard-hitting truths about coaching, slamming lazy coaches who can't even show up on time. Drawing on his own experience on both sides of the court, Oakley gives a candid perspective on what it takes to truly excel as a coach. He tells a revealing story about how he once confronted a player for not taking his responsibilities seriously and how that moment inspired him to become a better coach. This video is packed with insider tips and no-holds-barred insights that any aspiring coach should take to heart. Watch it now, and never look at coaching the same way again!

Full Video🔗:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3g6N3zkxRPk

This video is packed with insider tips and no-holds-barred insights that any aspiring coach should take to heart. Watch it now, and never look at coaching the same way again!
